summary: Triangles combine with Diamonds, Squares combine with Circles, Bank Purples
message_how: Triangles combine with diamonds, squares with circles. For the first match make sure the patterns are different (ie solid red triangle will not combine with solid red diamond, but will combine with any other patterned diamond). When you match, the carried shape remains the same (eg if you match red triangle with a diamond, youre now carrying an orange triangle).  Therefore, keep matching with the same second shape (in this example more diamonds).  So the sequence would be 1. Triangle + Diamond (different patten) > 2. Match with another Diamond (any pattern) > 3. Match with another Diamond > 4. Match with another Diamond etc etc.  Once you reach purple, bank the shape.
message_rules: Triangle + Diamond, Square + Circle, Bank when purple.  Initial matches in a sequence require these shapes but different patterns (eg solid square matches with striped circle, but solid square wont match with solid circle)
